text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
The sound of the waves is so pleasing to the ear—— 
It sounds just like cheering… 
Cheering meant for me.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
——Now come on! Let's fish and fish and fish some more! 
We'll make "Fishing Royce-chan" my new angle!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
…Is fishing always this slow!? 
This is even less time efficient than I thought it would be…!
choice_data_list: The slowness is what makes it fun.
The slowness is what makes it fun.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Nghh… This doesn't have enough impact to be my new angle… 
Right. Next time we'll focus on visual impact!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
What do you think about "Fighting Beauty Royce-chan"? 
SEIYAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Assistant Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Your agility shines like a diamond in the rough! 
After ten years of training, you'll be a top-class fighter…!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Ten years… 
Osu! I see! Goodbye!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
I know it's not as simple as dipping my toes in something and making it my new angle—— 
But still, all these options are too inefficient…!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
I'm calling a strategy meeting. 
We need to adjust our research methods and update our priors.

Even in the face of failure, Royce and Royce would never waver. 
She may have been my student, but I had to look up to her tenacity.

But our search for a new angle had a lot of points for concern. 
Maybe there was another way we could keep things fresh——

text_block_list.name: Announcement
text_block_list.text: The Instant Freeze-Dried Food Fest is happening now! Entry is free. Please, come on by!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: …Did she say "instant freeze-dried food"?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
You could say that. 
It's time-efficient to prepare, so I eat it all the time.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
I'm always buying things like instant vegetable soup in bulk. 
Would you like to try some?

It made sense, given how much she cared about time efficiency. But the fact that it extended to her eating habits, too… 
…I learned a little something new about her——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Did you think of something!?
choice_data_list: Why not make THIS your new angle?
Why not make THIS your new angle?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
They've got a lot more visitors than I expected. 
It looks like I'll be able show off some of my charm as an instant food specialist.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You've got some good ideas, Trainer. 
I never would've come up with "knowledgeable about instant food" as a new angle.
choice_data_list: The problem now is how to show it.
The problem now is how to show it.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Leave that to me. I've got a plan.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Your store's vegetable soup is a personal favorite of mine. 
It always comes in handy whenever I need something to eat during training breaks.

text_block_list.name: Store Staff
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! 
Aw man, knowing that even athletes love our stuff is enough to make me cry!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
It's an incredible product that can provide all the necessary nutrients in just a few short moments. 
I only wish more people could understand how lovely it is…

text_block_list.name: Store Staff
text_block_list.text:
Oh…! 
In that case, how'd you like to help us advertise!?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Why, I'd love to ♪

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Ahem… Hey, everyone! Are you tired of cooking and cooking, day in and day out? Well, I'm Royce and Royce, and I'm here to introduce you to a meal you can make in a snap♪

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
See this soup packed with veggies? W-W-W-W-Wow! 
Just add hot water, and it's done in a minute!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
It's made with a very special freeze-drying technique! 
This soup is every bit as delicious and nutritious as veggies fresh from the farm!

text_block_list.name: Housewife
text_block_list.text:
Hmm… It does look delicious… 
But our little one doesn't like eating greens…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
For the picky eater kids, we have a soup with great big chunks of sweet potato! It's an excellent source of fiber ♪ 
Perfect for a mid-homework snack!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
And that's it for Royce and Royce's Recommendation Corner. 
Thank you so much for listening～♪

text_block_list.name: Office Worker
text_block_list.text:
Royce-san's a racer, isn't she? 
I didn't know she knew about this stuff, too…

text_block_list.name: Housewife
text_block_list.text:
Are you on Umatter? 
I'd love it if you posted things like this～♪

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
This is it… Everything just clicked! 
Now I see. My new angle can be something I've had all along, but don't usually let show.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
But—— This still isn't enough. 
There's only so many hidden sides of myself I can show before go back to being stale.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Think, Royce, think! Think outside the box, just like Trainer did——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
! Eureka!! 
…Trainer, let's go to the bookstore!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Fact number one about me is that I'm intelligence incarnate! 
And we're going to show off that intelligence in a brand new way!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Presentation is key. 
There's no novelty in framing myself as just a good study.
Her appreciation for efficiency led us to her knowledge about instant foods. So by that logic, there must be something her studying skills can lead us to.
choice_data_list: Anything special you use to study?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: That's it!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: ——That's our proposal for an advice event on stationery for test-takers. Would you be willing to approve?

text_block_list.name: Bookstore Employee
text_block_list.text:
Of course. In fact, we would very much appreciate it. 
It's exam season, so we have more students coming to the store.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
You can leave them to us. 
We'll have your store packed to the brim!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
When I focus, I tense up… 
Before I know it, my hand's all tired from gripping the pen…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
First you need to change how you hold your pen. 
Tilt it toward yourself, and support it with the base of your index finger.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
And here I have a special pen that'll reduce the stress on your hand. It's called a "Grip Teacher"! 
Go on, give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Wait… I can write smoothly… W-Wow! 
You're a paper and pen specialist!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: She's a good student, so she's always working hard and coming up with new techniques… Um, Royce-san, could you please tell me what flash cards are best to use?!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Of course! But one at a time, okay? 
I'll be sure to find the perfect fit for each and every one of you ♪
On our way back from the event——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Take a look at this! 
I've got the housewife and student demographics following me now!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
It's happening, it's happening, it's really happening…! 
Next I just need to show off a new angle aimed at the fans, and then——
choice_data_list: No more staleness! You go, Royce!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Heehee. But you're the real MVP today. I never thought I needed to show those sides of me, but they turned out to be fresh new angles. What a great idea.
If it meant making a racer's dream come true, I'd do everything I could. But it was more than that——
choice_data_list: I'm here for you, no matter what.
I'm here for you, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
choice_data_list: We should go before it gets dark.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Right…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: (…For me…)
